file_name: Stridh et al. - 2022 - Photoacoustic imaging of periorbital skin cancer ex vivo unique spectral signatures of malignant me.json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study used photoacoustic imaging and linear spectral unmixing (a deterministic mathematical method based on known endmember spectra for hemoglobin, melanin, and collagen) to identify chromophore composition. It did not employ artificial intelligence, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms for classification, segmentation, or prediction.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
